Title: Relates to the docketing of judgments imposing civil penalties for the violation of certain requirements imposed by the zoning resolution of the city of New York
Summary: Relates to the docketing of judgments imposing civil penalties for the violation of certain requirements imposed by the zoning resolution of the city of New York; makes other technical changes.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the county law and the administrative code of the city of New York, in relation to the docketing of judgments imposing civil penalties for the violation of certain requirements imposed by the zoning resolution of the city of New York
